title: ctenitis effusa
intro: Ctenitis effusa, also known as the creeping ctenitis or the Pacific ctenitis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ctenitis effusa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. It can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, for consumption and topical application.
